MWFOURCC.h

7 
8 #pragma once
9 
10 #ifndef MWFOURCC
11 #define MWFOURCC(ch0, ch1, ch2, ch3) \
12  ((DWORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ((DWORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8) | \
13  ((DWORD)(BYTE)(ch2) << 16) | ((DWORD)(BYTE)(ch3) << 24))
14 #endif
15 
21 #define MWFOURCC_UNK MWFOURCC('U', 'N', 'K', 'N')
22 
32 #define MWFOURCC_GREY MWFOURCC('G', 'R', 'E', 'Y')
33 
43 #define MWFOURCC_Y800 MWFOURCC('Y', '8', '0', '0')
44 
54 #define MWFOURCC_Y8 MWFOURCC('Y', '8', ' ', ' ')
55 
65 #define MWFOURCC_Y16 MWFOURCC('Y', '1', '6', ' ')
66 
76 #define MWFOURCC_RGB15 MWFOURCC('R', 'G', 'B', '5')
77 
87 #define MWFOURCC_RGB16 MWFOURCC('R', 'G', 'B', '6')
88 
98 #define MWFOURCC_RGB24 MWFOURCC('R', 'G', 'B', ' ')
99 
109 #define MWFOURCC_RGBA MWFOURCC('R', 'G', 'B', 'A')
110 
120 #define MWFOURCC_ARGB MWFOURCC('A', 'R', 'G', 'B')
121 
131 #define MWFOURCC_BGR15 MWFOURCC('B', 'G', 'R', '5')
132 
142 #define MWFOURCC_BGR16 MWFOURCC('B', 'G', 'R', '6')
143 
153 #define MWFOURCC_BGR24 MWFOURCC('B', 'G', 'R', ' ')
154 
164 #define MWFOURCC_BGRA MWFOURCC('B', 'G', 'R', 'A')
165 
175 #define MWFOURCC_ABGR MWFOURCC('A', 'B', 'G', 'R')
176 
197 #define MWFOURCC_NV16 MWFOURCC('N', 'V', '1', '6')
198 
219 #define MWFOURCC_NV61 MWFOURCC('N', 'V', '6', '1')
220 
246 #define MWFOURCC_I422 MWFOURCC('I', '4', '2', '2')
247 
273 #define MWFOURCC_YV16 MWFOURCC('Y', 'V', '1', '6')
274 
275 
288 #define MWFOURCC_YUY2 MWFOURCC('Y', 'U', 'Y', '2')
289 
302 #define MWFOURCC_YUYV MWFOURCC('Y', 'U', 'Y', 'V')
303 
316 #define MWFOURCC_UYVY MWFOURCC('U', 'Y', 'V', 'Y')
317 
330 #define MWFOURCC_YVYU MWFOURCC('Y', 'V', 'Y', 'U')
331 
344 #define MWFOURCC_VYUY MWFOURCC('V', 'Y', 'U', 'Y')
345 
370 #define MWFOURCC_I420 MWFOURCC('I', '4', '2', '0')
371 
396 #define MWFOURCC_IYUV MWFOURCC('I', 'Y', 'U', 'V')
397 
420 #define MWFOURCC_NV12 MWFOURCC('N', 'V', '1', '2')
421 
446 #define MWFOURCC_YV12 MWFOURCC('Y', 'V', '1', '2')
447 
470 #define MWFOURCC_NV21 MWFOURCC('N', 'V', '2', '1')
471 
494 #define MWFOURCC_P010 MWFOURCC('P', '0', '1', '0')
495 
520 #define MWFOURCC_P210 MWFOURCC('P', '2', '1', '0')
521 
534 #define MWFOURCC_IYU2 MWFOURCC('I', 'Y', 'U', '2')
535 
548 #define MWFOURCC_V308 MWFOURCC('v', '3', '0', '8')
549 
550 
563 #define MWFOURCC_AYUV MWFOURCC('A', 'Y', 'U', 'V')
564 
577 #define MWFOURCC_UYVA MWFOURCC('U', 'Y', 'V', 'A')
578 
591 #define MWFOURCC_V408 MWFOURCC('v', '4', '0', '8')
592 
605 #define MWFOURCC_VYUA MWFOURCC('V', 'Y', 'U', 'A')
606 
620 #define MWFOURCC_V210 MWFOURCC('v', '2', '1', '0')
621 
634 #define MWFOURCC_Y210 MWFOURCC('Y', '2', '1', '0')
635 
648 #define MWFOURCC_Y410 MWFOURCC('Y', '4', '1', '0')
649 
662 #define MWFOURCC_V410 MWFOURCC('v', '4', '1', '0')
663 
673 #define MWFOURCC_RGB10 MWFOURCC('R', 'G', '1', '0')
674 
684 #define MWFOURCC_BGR10 MWFOURCC('B', 'G', '1', '0')
685 
692 inline BOOLEAN FOURCC_IsRGB(
693  DWORD dwFOURCC
694  )
695 {
696  switch (dwFOURCC) {
697  case MWFOURCC_RGB15:
698  case MWFOURCC_BGR15:
699  case MWFOURCC_RGB16:
700  case MWFOURCC_BGR16:
701  case MWFOURCC_RGB24:
702  case MWFOURCC_BGR24:
703  case MWFOURCC_RGBA:
704  case MWFOURCC_BGRA:
705  case MWFOURCC_ARGB:
706  case MWFOURCC_ABGR:
707  case MWFOURCC_RGB10:
708  case MWFOURCC_BGR10:
709  return TRUE;
710  default:
711  return FALSE;
712  }
713 }
714 
721 inline BOOLEAN FOURCC_IsPacked(
722  DWORD dwFOURCC
723  )
724 {
725  switch (dwFOURCC) {
726  case MWFOURCC_NV12:
727  case MWFOURCC_NV21:
728  case MWFOURCC_YV12:
729  case MWFOURCC_IYUV:
730  case MWFOURCC_I420:
731  case MWFOURCC_I422:
732  case MWFOURCC_YV16:
733  case MWFOURCC_NV16:
734  case MWFOURCC_NV61:
735  case MWFOURCC_P010:
736  case MWFOURCC_P210:
737  return FALSE;
738  default:
739  return TRUE;
740  }
741 }
742 
749 inline int FOURCC_GetBpp(
750  DWORD dwFOURCC
751  )
752 {
753  switch (dwFOURCC) {
754  case MWFOURCC_GREY:
755  case MWFOURCC_Y800:
756  case MWFOURCC_Y8:
757  return 8;
758 
759  case MWFOURCC_I420:
760  case MWFOURCC_IYUV:
761  case MWFOURCC_YV12:
762  case MWFOURCC_NV12:
763  case MWFOURCC_NV21:
764  return 12;
765 
766  case MWFOURCC_Y16:
767  case MWFOURCC_RGB15:
768  case MWFOURCC_BGR15:
769  case MWFOURCC_RGB16:
770  case MWFOURCC_BGR16:
771  case MWFOURCC_YUY2:
772  case MWFOURCC_YUYV:
773  case MWFOURCC_UYVY:
774  case MWFOURCC_YVYU:
775  case MWFOURCC_VYUY:
776  case MWFOURCC_I422:
777  case MWFOURCC_YV16:
778  case MWFOURCC_NV16:
779  case MWFOURCC_NV61:
780  return 16;
781 
782  case MWFOURCC_IYU2:
783  case MWFOURCC_V308:
784  case MWFOURCC_RGB24:
785  case MWFOURCC_BGR24:
786  case MWFOURCC_P010:
787  case MWFOURCC_V210:
788  return 24;
789 
790  case MWFOURCC_AYUV:
791  case MWFOURCC_UYVA:
792  case MWFOURCC_V408:
793  case MWFOURCC_VYUA:
794  case MWFOURCC_RGBA:
795  case MWFOURCC_BGRA:
796  case MWFOURCC_ARGB:
797  case MWFOURCC_ABGR:
798  case MWFOURCC_Y410:
799  case MWFOURCC_V410:
800  case MWFOURCC_Y210:
801  case MWFOURCC_P210:
802  case MWFOURCC_RGB10:
803  case MWFOURCC_BGR10:
804  return 32;
805 
806  default:
807  return 0;
808  }
809 }
810 
819 inline DWORD FOURCC_CalcMinStride(
820  DWORD dwFOURCC,
821  int cx,
822  DWORD dwAlign
823  )
824 {
825  BOOLEAN bPacked = FOURCC_IsPacked(dwFOURCC);
826 
827  DWORD cbLine;
828 
829  if (bPacked) {
830  if (dwFOURCC == MWFOURCC_V210) {
831  cx = (cx + 47) / 48 * 48;
832  cbLine = cx * 8 / 3;
833  } else {
834  int nBpp = FOURCC_GetBpp(dwFOURCC);
835  cbLine = (cx * nBpp) / 8;
836  }
837  } else {
838  switch (dwFOURCC) {
839  case MWFOURCC_P010:
840  case MWFOURCC_P210:
841  cbLine = cx * 2;
842  break;
843  default:
844  cbLine = cx;
845  break;
846  }
847  }
848 
849  return (cbLine + dwAlign - 1) & ~(dwAlign - 1);
850 }
851 
861 inline DWORD FOURCC_CalcImageSize(
862  DWORD dwFOURCC,
863  int cx,
864  int cy,
865  DWORD cbStride
866  )
867 {
868  BOOLEAN bPacked = FOURCC_IsPacked(dwFOURCC);
869 
870  if (bPacked) {
871  DWORD cbLine;
872 
873  if (dwFOURCC == MWFOURCC_V210) {
874  cx = (cx + 47) / 48 * 48;
875  cbLine = cx * 8 / 3;
876  } else {
877  int nBpp = FOURCC_GetBpp(dwFOURCC);
878  cbLine = (cx * nBpp) / 8;
879  }
880  if (cbStride < cbLine)
881  return 0;
882 
883  return cbStride * cy;
884  } else {
885  if (cbStride < (DWORD)cx)
886  return 0;
887 
888  switch (dwFOURCC) {
889  case MWFOURCC_NV12:
890  case MWFOURCC_NV21:
891  case MWFOURCC_YV12:
892  case MWFOURCC_IYUV:
893  case MWFOURCC_I420:
894  if ((cbStride & 1) || (cy & 1))
895  return 0;
896  return cbStride * cy * 3 / 2;
897  case MWFOURCC_I422:
898  case MWFOURCC_YV16:
899  case MWFOURCC_NV16:
900  case MWFOURCC_NV61:
901  if (cbStride & 1)
902  return 0;
903  return cbStride * cy * 2;
904  case MWFOURCC_P010:
905  if ((cbStride & 3) || (cy & 1))
906  return 0;
907  return cbStride * cy * 3 / 2;
908  case MWFOURCC_P210:
909  if (cbStride & 3)
910  return 0;
911  return cbStride * cy * 2;
912 
913  default:
914  return 0;
915  }
916  }
917 }
918 
919 #ifdef _KSMEDIA_
920 #define MWCAP_BITMAPINFOHEADER KS_BITMAPINFOHEADER
921 #define MWCAP_BI_RGB KS_BI_RGB
922 #define MWCAP_BI_BITFIELDS KS_BI_BITFIELDS
923 #else
924 #define MWCAP_BITMAPINFOHEADER BITMAPINFOHEADER
925 #define MWCAP_BI_RGB BI_RGB
926 #define MWCAP_BI_BITFIELDS BI_BITFIELDS
927 #endif
928 
938 inline BOOLEAN FOURCC_IsMask(const DWORD * pdwMasks, DWORD dwRedMask, DWORD dwGreenMask, DWORD dwBlueMask)
939 {
940  return ((pdwMasks[0] == dwRedMask) && (pdwMasks[1] == dwGreenMask) && (pdwMasks[2] == dwBlueMask));
941 }
942 
951 inline DWORD FOURCC_GetFromBitmapHeader(
952  DWORD biCompression,
953  WORD biBitCount,
954  DWORD * pdwMasks
955  )
956 {
957  switch (biCompression) {
958  case MWCAP_BI_RGB:
959  switch (biBitCount) {
960  case 16:
961  return MWFOURCC_BGR15;
962  case 24:
963  return MWFOURCC_BGR24;
964  case 32:
965  return MWFOURCC_BGRA;
966  default:
967  return MWFOURCC_UNK;
968  }
969  break;
970 
971  case MWCAP_BI_BITFIELDS:
972  {
973  switch (biBitCount) {
974  case 16:
975  if (FOURCC_IsMask(pdwMasks, 0x0000F800, 0x000007E0, 0x0000001F))
976  return MWFOURCC_BGR16;
977  else if (FOURCC_IsMask(pdwMasks, 0x0000001F, 0x000007E0, 0x0000F800))
978  return MWFOURCC_RGB16;
979  else if (FOURCC_IsMask(pdwMasks, 0x00007C00, 0x000003E0, 0x0000001F))
980  return MWFOURCC_BGR15;
981  else if (FOURCC_IsMask(pdwMasks, 0x0000001F, 0x000003E0, 0x00007C00))
982  return MWFOURCC_RGB15;
983  else
984  return MWFOURCC_UNK;
985 
986  case 24:
987  if (FOURCC_IsMask(pdwMasks, 0x00FF0000, 0x0000FF00, 0x000000FF))
988  return MWFOURCC_BGR24;
989  else if (FOURCC_IsMask(pdwMasks, 0x000000FF, 0x0000FF00, 0x00FF0000))
990  return MWFOURCC_RGB24;
991  else
992  return MWFOURCC_UNK;
993 
994  case 32:
995  if (FOURCC_IsMask(pdwMasks, 0x00FF0000, 0x0000FF00, 0x000000FF))
996  return MWFOURCC_BGRA;
997  else if (FOURCC_IsMask(pdwMasks, 0x000000FF, 0x0000FF00, 0x00FF0000))
998  return MWFOURCC_RGBA;
999  else if (FOURCC_IsMask(pdwMasks, 0xFF000000, 0x00FF0000, 0x0000FF00))
1000  return MWFOURCC_ABGR;
1001  else if (FOURCC_IsMask(pdwMasks, 0x0000FF00, 0x00FF0000, 0xFF000000))
1002  return MWFOURCC_ARGB;
1003  else
1004  return MWFOURCC_UNK;
1005 
1006  default:
1007  return MWFOURCC_UNK;
1008  }
1009  }
1010  break;
1011 
1012  default:
1013  return biCompression;
1014  }
1015 }
1016 
1023 inline DWORD FOURCC_GetFromBitmapHeader(
1024  const MWCAP_BITMAPINFOHEADER * pbmih
1025  )
1026 {
1027  DWORD *pdwMasks = (DWORD *)(pbmih + 1);
1028  return FOURCC_GetFromBitmapHeader(pbmih->biCompression, pbmih->biBitCount, pdwMasks);
1029 }
MWFOURCC_Y410
#define MWFOURCC_Y410
Y410.
